deployedUrl: N/A (CLI tool — run locally with `python3 agent.py briefing`)
title: Daily Briefing Agent
description: A Python CLI agent that reads all emails and texts from an Inkbox inbox, sends them to Gemini 2.5 Flash for analysis, and emails a structured weekly briefing with upcoming schedule, action items, and highlights. Stack: Python, Inkbox SDK (email/SMS), Google Generative AI (Gemini). Key learning: Inkbox SDK doesn't support sending SMS, only receiving — adapted by making the agent email-only for notifications.
